auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Neutrino API key sent with the API-Key header. View your API key in the Neutrino API dashboard: https://www.neutrinoapi.com/account/dashboard/.

extraFields.label: User ID
extraFields.description: Neutrino User ID paired with the API key and sent with the User-ID header. View it in the Neutrino API dashboard: https://www.neutrinoapi.com/account/dashboard/.

actions.name: check_ip_blocklist
actions.description: Check whether an IP address is listed on Neutrino security blocklists.

ip.description: An IPv4 or IPv6 address. CIDR notation, port numbers, and comma-separated IPs are also accepted by Neutrino.

vpn-lookup.description: Whether to include public VPN provider IP addresses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Neutrino IP blocklist lookup.

ip.description: The IP address that was checked.

is-bot.description: Whether the IP hosts a malicious bot or botnet member.

is-exploit-bot.description: Whether the IP is running exploit scanning software.

is-malware.description: Whether the IP is involved in distributing or running malware.

is-spider.description: Whether the IP is running a hostile web spider.

is-dshield.description: Whether DShield flagged the IP as a significant attack source.

list-count.description: The number of blocklists the IP is listed on.

is-proxy.description: Whether the IP is an anonymous web proxy.

is-hijacked.description: Whether the IP is part of a hijacked netblock.

is-tor.description: Whether the IP is a Tor node or related service.

is-spyware.description: Whether the IP is involved in distributing or running spyware.

is-spam-bot.description: Whether the IP hosts spam bot software.

is-listed.description: Whether the IP is listed on any blocklist.

is-vpn.description: Whether the IP belongs to a public VPN provider.

last-seen.description: The Unix time when this IP was last seen on any blocklist.

blocklists.description: Blocklist categories this IP is listed on.

blocklist.description: The primary blocklist category this sensor belongs to.

description.description: Details about the sensor source and malicious activity type.

cidr.description: The CIDR address for this listing when listed.

outputSchema.description: IP blocklist payload returned by Neutrino.

actions.name: get_ip_info
actions.description: Get Neutrino geolocation and reverse-DNS details for an IP address.

ip.description: An IPv4 or IPv6 address. CIDR notation is also accepted by Neutrino.

reverse-lookup.description: Whether to run a reverse DNS PTR lookup.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Neutrino IP info lookup.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address returned.

valid.description: Whether this is a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address.

is-v6.description: Whether this is an IPv6 address.

is-v4-mapped.description: Whether this is an IPv4-mapped IPv6 address.

is-bogon.description: Whether this is a bogon, private, local, or reserved IP address.

currency-code.description: The ISO 4217 currency code associated with the country.

region-code.description: The ISO 3166-2 region code when detectable.

language-code.description: The ISO 2-letter official language code for the country.

hostname.description: The full hostname when reverse lookup is enabled.

host-domain.description: The host domain when reverse lookup is enabled.

id.description: The IANA timezone ID, or an empty string if no valid timezone was detected.

date.description: The current date in the timezone as YYYY-MM-DD.

time.description: The current time in the timezone.

offset.description: The UTC offset for the timezone in ISO 8601 format.

outputSchema.description: IP geolocation payload returned by Neutrino.

actions.name: lookup_domain
actions.description: Get Neutrino domain registration, DNS, mail, website, and blocklist details.

host.description: A domain name, hostname, FQDN, URL, HTML link, or email address.

live.description: Whether to perform live checks for domains Neutrino has not seen before.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Neutrino domain lookup.

domain.description: The primary domain name excluding subdomains.

valid.description: Whether a valid registered domain with DNS NS records was found.

is-subdomain.description: Whether the FQDN is a subdomain of the primary domain.

tld-cc.description: The associated ISO 2-letter country code for country-code TLDs.

rank.description: The estimated global traffic rank, or 0 when outside the top one million.

is-gov.description: Whether this domain is under a government or military TLD.

is-opennic.description: Whether this domain is under an OpenNIC TLD.

is-pending.description: Whether this unseen domain is still being processed.

is-adult.description: Whether the domain hosts adult content.

is-malicious.description: Whether the domain is listed on at least one blocklist.

blocklists.description: Blocklist categories this domain is listed on.

blocklist.description: The primary blocklist category this sensor belongs to.

description.description: Details about the sensor source and malicious activity type.

sensors.description: Blocklist sensors that detected this domain.

registered-date.description: The ISO registration or first-seen date, or an empty string.

age.description: The number of days since the domain was registered.

registrar-id.description: The IANA registrar ID, or 0 when unavailable.

mail-provider.description: The primary email provider domain, or an empty string.

expiry-date.description: The ISO expiry date, or an empty string.

website-provider.description: The primary website hosting provider domain, or an empty string.

outputSchema.description: Domain intelligence payload returned by Neutrino.

actions.name: validate_email
actions.description: Parse, validate, and clean an email address with Neutrino.

email.description: The email address to parse, validate, and clean.

fix-typos.description: Whether to automatically attempt to fix typos in the address.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Neutrino email validation.

valid.description: Whether the email has valid syntax, an active domain, correct DNS records, and operational MX servers.

email.description: The complete email address, corrected when typo fixing is enabled.

domain.description: The domain name of the email address.

provider.description: The domain name of the email hosting provider.

mx-ip.description: The first resolved IP address of the primary MX server, or an empty string.

is-freemail.description: Whether the address is from a free email provider.

is-disposable.description: Whether the address is from a disposable, temporary, or darknet email service.

is-personal.description: Whether the address likely belongs to a person.

syntax-error.description: Whether the address has RFC syntax errors.

domain-error.description: Whether the address has domain name or DNS errors.

domain-status.description: The email domain status returned by Neutrino.

outputSchema.description: Email validation result returned by Neutrino.

actions.name: validate_phone
actions.description: Parse, validate, format, and locate a phone number with Neutrino.

number.description: The phone number in international or local format.

ip.description: A user IP address used to infer the country for local numbers.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Neutrino phone validation.

valid.description: Whether this is a valid phone number.

type.description: The number type based on the number prefix.

international-number.description: The number represented in E.164 format.

local-number.description: The number represented in local dialing format.

country-code.description: The phone number country as an ISO 2-letter country code.

country-code3.description: The phone number country as an ISO 3-letter country code.

currency-code.description: The ISO 4217 currency code associated with the country.

is-mobile.description: Whether this is a mobile number.

prefix-network.description: The network or carrier that owns the prefix when available.

outputSchema.description: Phone validation result returned by Neutrino.
